mapper.select: SELECT * FROM download_task ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM download_task WHERE status IN (${statuses}) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM download_task WHERE status NOT IN (${statuses})
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM download_task WHERE chat_id = #{chatId} AND message_id = #{messageId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM download_task WHERE status IN (${statuses})
SELECT * FROM download_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO download_task ( message_id, chat_id, chat_title, file_name, file_size, mime_type, status, local_path, error_message, remote_url, upload_status, telegram_file_id, telegram_unique_file_id, downloaded_size, message_data, chat_config_id, extra_data, is_stop_transmission, started_at, finished_at, total_task, success_task, failed_task, skip_task, download_speed, bot_chat_id, bot_message_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{chatId}, #{chatTitle}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{status}, #{localPath}, #{errorMessage}, #{remoteUrl}, #{uploadStatus}, #{telegramFileId}, #{telegramUniqueFileId}, #{downloadedSize}, #{messageData}, #{chatConfigId}, #{extraData}, #{isStopTransmission}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{totalTask}, #{successTask}, #{failedTask}, #{skipTask}, #{downloadSpeed}, #{botChatId}, #{botMessageId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE download_task SET message_id = #{messageId}, chat_id = #{chatId}, chat_title = #{chatTitle}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_size = #{fileSize}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, status = #{status}, local_path = #{localPath}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, remote_url = #{remoteUrl}, upload_status = #{uploadStatus}, telegram_file_id = #{telegramFileId}, telegram_unique_file_id = #{telegramUniqueFileId}, downloaded_size = #{downloadedSize}, message_data = #{messageData}, chat_config_id = #{chatConfigId}, extra_data = #{extraData}, is_stop_transmission = #{isStopTransmission}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, total_task = #{totalTask}, success_task = #{successTask}, failed_task = #{failedTask}, skip_task = #{skipTask}, download_speed = #{downloadSpeed}, bot_chat_id = #{botChatId}, bot_message_id = #{botMessageId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM download_task WHERE chat_id LIKE '-%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM download_task WHERE chat_id LIKE '-%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM download_task WHERE chat_id LIKE '-%' AND status IN (${statuses})

SELECT * FROM download_task t WHERE t.chat_id LIKE '-%'
AND t.status = 'SUCCESS_DOWNLOAD'
AND t.status != 'SUCCESS_DOWNLOAD'
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM download_task t WHERE t.chat_id LIKE '-%'
AND t.status = 'SUCCESS_DOWNLOAD'
AND t.status != 'SUCCESS_DOWNLOAD'
